rationale: Builds on the current best 0053 script instead of resetting. The 0053 win came from columnwise MLP expansion int8 plus projection EMA, but recent full-model endgame variants were flat or worse. This change keeps the same quantizer and final exact roundtrip, and only changes late quant-aware mixing: projection weights and transposed MLP expansion weights still get the strong scheduled mix, while other quantized tensors get a light 0.15 nudge. That should preserve the useful final-manifold pressure on the known sensitive matrices without over-disturbing QKV and other matrices during the last ~48 seconds.
title: Selective Quant-Aware MLP Expansion Plus Projection Endgame
